comment.description: A brief description or note about the CloudFront response headers policy.

cors_config.description: Configuration for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) settings, detailing what resources can be shared between different origins.

custom_headers_config.description: Defines custom headers that CloudFront should add to HTTP responses.

etag.description: The entity tag (ETag) for the response headers policy, used for cache validation.

id.description: The unique identifier for the CloudFront response headers policy.

name.description: The name of the CloudFront response headers policy.

remove_headers_config.description: Configuration specifying headers that should be removed from HTTP responses.

security_headers_config.description: Settings for security-related headers to protect your application from common web vulnerabilities.

server_timing_headers_config.description: Configuration for server timing headers, which provide performance metrics about the request.
